title: Fix duplicate Ibrahim card in congress UI

log.context: Fix duplicate Ibrahim card in congress UI

Root cause and fix:

**Root cause:** The `congress_create_tasks` activity runs after the hiring-manager synthesis, calling Claude to extract actionable tasks from the verdict. When there are no tasks (as in congress-0015 — a "resolution denied" verdict), it returns the literal string `"NONE"`. This gets appended to `rounds` as a `hiring-manager` entry just like the real synthesis.

The existing filter in `congress.html` (~line 2382) already blocked `PERSONA:` (evolution entries) and `TASK:` (tas...(truncated)
